name: GOLFTEC Tysons Corner
about: GOLFTEC Tysons Corner is a golf instruction and training facility specializing in data-driven coaching and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technologies such as OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized improvement plans. Services include private golf lessons, practice sessions with access to training bays, and professional club fittings to optimize equipment performance. The facility is part of a larger network known for its PGA award-winning coaches and structured lesson programs designed for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans and game strategies tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Professional club fittings using advanced launch monitors to optimize club performance and distance

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor mentioned in multiple contexts for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. You can also purchase custom-fit clubs directly through the facility after a fitting session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink services, and no BYOB policy is specified. It's recommended to contact the location directly for specific policies outside of coaching services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on instruction and practice rather than full simulated rounds. The time for a standard lesson or practice session varies based on the package and individual goals.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels, including youth instruction and development programs.
